title: Hot air extraction system for automobile cabinet
abstract: Hot air extraction removable system, for enclosed compartments, particularly a motor vehicle cabin, comprising a portable unit for extracting air from the cabin and directing it outside the motor vehicle, that consist on at least one unit of hot air extractor that connects the outside and the inside of the vehicle.
claims: Claims C L A I M S 1 . - Modular system for refrigeration of enclosed compartments comprising: â¢ an air inlet unit connected to the inside of the compartment, Â· an air extraction unit for extracting inner air inside the compartment connected to the air inlet unit, â¢ an air outlet unit connected to the air extraction unit connected to the air extraction unit, once being recirculated. â¢ a temperature measuring unit comprising a temperature sensor, located inside the compartment and connected to a temperature control located outside the modular system, and â¢ a system power supply. 2. - System according to claim 1 , wherein the temperature measuring unit is programmable. 3. - System according to claim 1 , wherein the air inlet unit and/or outlet unit is a tube or a grid. 4.- System according to claim 1 , wherein the system power supply is a battery or a system using energy from other sources. 5.- System according to claim 1 , wherein the compartment is a motor vehicle.
